title: Deepen the Claude/Codex Backend seam
prompt: Replace scattered Claude/Codex lifecycle switches with a RunnerBackendAdapter registry and a shared protocol capability descriptor. Preserve spawn, resume, fork, container and approval behavior. Unsupported feature combinations must fail through capability negotiation with a useful reason.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Backend adapter, resume, fork and driver tests pass

evaluator.run: pnpm --filter @co/runner exec vitest run src/backendAdapters.test.ts src/methods.resume.test.ts src/methods.fork.test.ts src/claude/driver.test.ts src/codex/driver.test.ts

constraints: Claude and Codex must be two real Adapter implementations
Do not couple the common DriverEmit interface to one backend
Keep opencode explicitly unsupported until it has a real Adapter
